channel.title: Binaural Beats Lab
channel.description: Scientifically designed binaural beats for focus, sleep, meditation, anxiety relief, and mental wellness.
channel.itunes:author: Binaural Beats Lab
channel.itunes:summary: Scientifically designed binaural beats for focus, sleep, meditation, anxiety relief, and mental wellness.

item.title: 眠りながら癒される｜528Hzヒーリング周波数｜8時間 | Heal While You Sleep | 528Hz + Alpha Waves | Miracle Tone | Binaural B
item.description:
🎧 リラクゼーション・不安解消・瞑想に最適なバイノーラルビート ヘッドフォン推奨。アルファ波で心と体を深いリラックスへ。 作業用BGM・ストレス解消・瞑想にどうぞ。
TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION
528Hz Solfeggio Healing Frequency with Alpha Wave Binaural Beats
Use headphones for the full binaural effect. Left ear: 528Hz | Right ear: 538Hz = 10Hz Alpha Wave
528Hz is known as the 'Love Frequency' and is associated with DNA repair, transformation, and miracles. Combined with 10Hz alpha waves for deep relaxation and healing.
Perfect for: Healing, relaxation, positive transformation
#528Hz #HealingFrequency #BinauralBeats #Solfeggio #AlphaWaves #BrainwaveEntrainment
👉 If this helped you, subscribe for new binaural beats every day. 🔔 https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCVDYBRk5XijN9KHNXGJXskQ?sub_confirmation=1

item.title: 霧の中の安らぎ｜8Hzアルファ波バイノーラルビート｜8時間 | Calm Anxiety Fast | 8Hz Alpha Waves | Binaural Beats | Stress Relief
item.description:
🎧 リラクゼーション・不安解消・瞑想に最適なバイノーラルビート ヘッドフォン推奨。アルファ波で心と体を深いリラックスへ。 作業用BGM・ストレス解消・瞑想にどうぞ。
TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION
8Hz Alpha Wave Binaural Beats for Anxiety Relief
Use headphones for the full binaural effect. Left ear: 170Hz | Right ear: 178Hz = 8Hz Alpha Wave
8Hz alpha waves sit at the border of alpha and theta, promoting deep calm while reducing anxiety and worry.
Perfect for: Anxiety relief, panic attacks, stress management
#BinauralBeats #AlphaWaves #AnxietyRelief #Calm #MentalHealth #BrainwaveEntrainment
👉 If this helped you, subscribe for new binaural beats every day. 🔔 https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCVDYBRk5XijN9KHNXGJXskQ?sub_confirmation=1

item.title: Melt Stress Away | 10Hz Alpha Waves | Binaural Beats | Relaxation & Calm | 8 Hours
item.description:
TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION
10Hz Alpha Wave Binaural Beats for Relaxation
Use headphones for the full binaural effect. Left ear: 200Hz | Right ear: 210Hz = 10Hz Alpha Wave
Alpha waves (8-14Hz) promote a state of calm alertness, reducing stress and anxiety while maintaining mental clarity.
Perfect for: Relaxation, stress relief, light meditation
#BinauralBeats #AlphaWaves #Relaxation #StressRelief #BrainwaveEntrainment

item.title: CALM ANXIETY FAST | 8Hz Alpha Binaural Beats | Stress Relief & Peace
item.description: TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION. Experience profound relaxation and anxiety relief with our 8Hz Alpha Binaural Beats. Designed to help calm an overactive mind, this 8-hour track combines scientifically calibrated frequencies (Left: 170.0Hz, Right: 178.0Hz) with soothing ambient music for an immersive experience. Remember to use headphones for optimal brainwave entrainment and let the healing frequencies guide you to peace and tranquility. Perfect for meditation, stress relief, and finding your inner calm. Explore the benefits of binaural beats today! リラクゼーション音楽, 安眠音楽, 瞑想音楽.

item.title: HEAL WHILE YOU SLEEP ➤ 10Hz Alpha Binaural Beats | Sleep Music
item.description: TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION. Experience deep healing while you sleep with our meticulously crafted binaural beats. This track features a precise frequency of 10.0Hz alpha waves, designed to promote relaxation and rejuvenation. Using headphones is essential to fully experience the brainwave entrainment effect. The left ear receives a frequency of 528.0Hz while the right ear hears 538.0Hz, creating a soothing soundscape that nurtures your mind and spirit. Perfect for those seeking restful sleep and healing. Dive into tranquility and let the miracle tone guide you to a peaceful night. リラクゼーション音楽, 安眠音楽, 瞑想音楽.

item.title: CALM ANXIETY FAST | 8Hz Alpha Binaural Beats | Stress Relief & Peace
item.description: TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION. Experience deep relaxation and serenity with our 8Hz Alpha Waves designed to calm anxiety and promote inner peace. This 8-hour session features precise binaural beat frequencies that are scientifically calibrated for effective brainwave entrainment. For optimal results, please use headphones. The left ear receives a frequency of 170.0Hz, while the right ear receives 178.0Hz, creating a harmonious soundscape that facilitates stress relief and tranquility. Perfect for meditation, stress relief, or simply unwinding after a hectic day.

item.title: MAXIMIZE STUDY FOCUS | 14Hz Beta Waves Binaural Beats | Learning & Memory
item.description: TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION. Enhance your study sessions and boost your memory retention with our meticulously crafted binaural beats designed specifically for focus. Using precise frequencies of 14Hz Beta Waves, this 8-hour audio track helps you enter a heightened state of concentration, enabling you to absorb information more effectively. Remember to use headphones for the best experience, as the left ear will receive a frequency of 220.0Hz while the right ear receives 234.0Hz, creating an optimal brainwave entrainment effect. Dive into your studies with clarity and purpose — your journey towards enhanced learning starts here!

item.title: MELT STRESS AWAY | 10Hz Alpha Binaural Beats | Relaxation
item.description: TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION. Experience the soothing power of 10Hz alpha waves designed to melt stress away and bring you a sense of calm and relaxation. Utilizing precise binaural beat frequencies backed by neuroscience, this 8-hour track combines calibrated brainwave entrainment with ambient music for an enriching listening experience. For optimal results, please use headphones. Left: 200.0Hz, Right: 210.0Hz. Allow yourself to unwind and find your inner peace with our healing frequency.

item.title: UNLOCK LUCID DREAMING ➤ "Deep Dream State" | 5Hz Theta Binaural Beats | Sleep & Dreaming
item.description: TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION. Experience the power of 5Hz theta waves designed to unlock your subconscious and enhance your lucid dreaming abilities. This 8-hour binaural beats track combines precise frequencies (Left: 180.0Hz, Right: 185.0Hz) with soothing ambient music, creating a perfect environment for deep sleep and dream exploration. Use headphones for the best experience and allow your mind to drift into a profound dream state. Scientifically calibrated for optimal brainwave entrainment, this track offers a unique strength that sets it apart from random tones — it's crafted for your healing and relaxation. Embrace tranquility and let the journey begin.

item.title: HEAL WHILE YOU SLEEP | 10Hz Alpha Binaural Beats | Miracle Tone
item.description: TUNE YOUR BRAIN — PRECISION BINAURAL BEATS FOR SLEEP, FOCUS & MEDITATION. Experience the power of healing frequencies with our meticulously crafted binaural beats. This 8-hour session features a precise 10Hz Alpha wave designed to promote deep relaxation and rejuvenation while you sleep. To achieve optimal results, please use headphones for an immersive experience. The left ear receives a frequency of 528.0Hz, while the right ear resonates at 538.0Hz, creating a harmonious environment for brainwave entrainment. Ideal for those seeking restful sleep, stress relief, and emotional healing. Discover the magic of sound and unlock your potential with our miracle tone. 眠りの音楽, 瞑想音楽, リラクゼーション音楽.
